title: Fireworks & Particle Effects
description: Learn how to create and customize fireworks for celebrations, events, or visual effects.

lessons.title: Creating Basic Fireworks
lessons.content:
## Introduction
Fireworks are visual effects that can be spawned using the Bukkit API. They can have colors, shapes, and flicker effects.

### Example: Launch a Basic Firework
```java
Firework firework = player.getWorld().spawn(player.getLocation(), Firework.class);
FireworkMeta meta = firework.getFireworkMeta();
meta.addEffect(FireworkEffect.builder().withColor(Color.RED).with(FireworkEffect.Type.BALL).build());
meta.setPower(1);
firework.setFireworkMeta(meta);
```

### Logic Explanation
- `spawn(Location, Firework.class)` creates a firework entity.
- `FireworkMeta` allows customization (color, type, flicker, trail).
- `setPower(int)` controls flight duration.

### Edge Cases & Warnings
- High numbers of fireworks may cause client lag.
- Ensure color and type combinations are valid.
- Fireworks can damage nearby entities if setPower > 1.

quiz.question: Which method sets the properties of a firework?
What does the power parameter affect?

lessons.title: Advanced Firework Effects
lessons.content:
## Introduction
You can create multi-colored fireworks, add trails, flicker effects, and different explosion types.

### Example: Multi-color Firework with Trail
```java
Firework firework = player.getWorld().spawn(player.getLocation(), Firework.class);
FireworkMeta meta = firework.getFireworkMeta();
FireworkEffect effect = FireworkEffect.builder()
    .withColor(Color.RED)
    .withColor(Color.BLUE)
    .with(FireworkEffect.Type.STAR)
    .withFlicker()
    .withTrail()
    .build();
meta.addEffect(effect);
meta.setPower(2);
firework.setFireworkMeta(meta);
```

### Logic Explanation
- Multiple colors can be chained with `withColor()`.
- `withFlicker()` adds a flicker effect.
- `withTrail()` adds a trailing particle effect.
- Different `Type` values create different explosion shapes.

### Edge Cases & Warnings
- Too many effects can cause client FPS drops.
- Fireworks with `power > 3` can travel very high, be careful in small worlds.
- Always test colors on dark/light backgrounds for visibility.

quiz.question: Which method adds flicker to a firework effect?
What does `FireworkEffect.Type.STAR` do?
options: Sets explosion shape to a star

quiz.question: Why should you avoid too many fireworks at once?

lessons.title: Firework Tips & Best Practices

quiz.question: Which firework type is suitable for a Creeper-shaped explosion?
Why schedule fireworks instead of spawning all at once?
options: To look sequential and reduce lag
